notes: SHIP v1.14.231 — .230 device-verify follow-up: 1U cluster cleanup at the top of the FLAT elevation (the U44/U43/U42 two-leafs+mgmt group). CSS-only, all body.rd .reh-fitted .is-1u-scoped -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical. THREE stacked defects, all traced to the .230 1U styling: (1) BRACKET FRAGMENTS — .230 set border-top:0;border-bottom:0 to save vertical room, which left only the 3px left accent + 1px right border under border-radius:3px, so the unclosed rounded corners rendered as broken bracket stubs. FIX: restore a full hairline box (border-top/right/bottom 1px rgba(180,194,208,0.20)) and border-radius:0 -> corners close, no fragments, each 1U reads as a clean bounded list-row. (2) CLUMPED / JAMMED / 'not aligned, all at the U42 label' — the block positioning MATH was already correct (each 1U gets top:calc(var(--u-h)*N), exactly one U apart), but with the top/bottom borders gone the three dark trays 2px apart merged into one dark mass with no per-row delineation, reading as clumped. Restoring the hairline box + forcing height:var(--u-h)!important (undo the -2px inline gap that was crushing the text line) makes each row a full-height bounded box on its own U line, with the butting hairline borders as the divider. (3) TEXT CLIP + MID-WORD TRUNCATION — the 1U name had flex-shrink:0, so it grew to full content width and was hard-clipped by the block overflow:hidden (its own text-overflow:ellipsis never engaged because the element wasn't overflowing itself). FIX: name flex:0 1 auto; min-width:0; max-width:62% (shrinks + ellipsizes cleanly, capped so the model keeps room); meta flex:1 1 auto; min-width:0 (the model·type line is the first to truncate). Both now ellipsize at a boundary, never a raw parent-overflow cut. Font tightened to 9px name / 8px meta to fit the ~12px fitted U-height. NOTE: positioning code (rackElevation_buildHtml top/height emit) was NOT touched — if the three still read as clumped after this, that would indicate a MASTER data collision (like the U38 one), now visible as three distinct empty-ish rows instead of a merged mass. Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline blocks, CSS braces balanced, CRLF, three-stamp .230->.231. No ecc pass this ship (session cost); scoped CSS-only follow-up. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP, John iPhone): (1) the top U44/U43/U42 group — each device sits on its OWN U line with a visible hairline gap, no merging/clumping; (2) clean bordered rows, NO broken bracket fragments at the pill ends; (3) model names truncate with an ellipsis, never cut mid-word; (4) rest of the elevation (multi-U trays, fit-to-one-screen, no nav bleed, U38 badge) unchanged from .230; (5) rotate -> still fits; (6) ?legacy=1 unchanged. Batch now 10 owed. Stage A stays GATED until this + .230 verify clean.
